rawFiles.notes: Fetched for checksum review only; raw HTML is not committed.

transforms: Extract location-level physical access updates from the Syria status updates section of the meeting minutes.
Use the meeting date, 2026-04-30, as statusAsOf and the page publication/revision date, 2026-05-14, as sourceReferences[].sourceRecordDate.
Match source facility names to existing canonical location IDs by exact names, existing aliases, or unambiguous counterpart names.
Normalize source wording into observedStatus values while preserving concise source-backed notes.
Keep route/corridor details and ambiguous crossing names out of the point-location status snapshot import.
reviewNotes: Imported 12 dated status snapshot records: 6 border crossing observations, 2 port observations, and 4 airport observations. No new location identities were added, and no location operationalStatus values were changed. Held Al-Yaroubiyah because the existing canonical record does not yet carry an explicit Al-Yaroubiyah alias, and held Nisibis because it appears under the Iraq crossing bullet while the likely canonical match is the Qamishli/Nusaybin Turkey crossing. The source terms limit reuse to non-commercial humanitarian or related non-profit/academic activity with attribution, so this source should be reviewed again before broad commercial redistribution.
